# Vellvii

Vellvii is a luxury intimate wellness brand creating discreet, refined products for modern couples. The collection includes portable and home-focused storage pieces, DOX-compatible products, and a design-led Pleasure Collection built around privacy, elegance, and thoughtful use.

## Current product lineup
- Vellvii DOX - a biometric sex toy lock box and bedroom storage hub. Functions as the storage and docking system at the center of the Vellvii Pleasure Collection, with a velvet-lined interior and a movable velvet-lined tray for smaller pieces. Refined biometric access supports private, discreet sex toy storage.
- Vellvii Lux - a portable fingerprint-lock storage case the size of a refined toiletries bag. Travel-friendly storage case with a velvet-lined interior. Lux is a separate portable sex toy storage case and is not part of the DOX docking system.
- Vellvii G-Vibe - DOX-compatible through the VDS suction mount that sits atop the DOX.
- Vellvii Evolve - DOX-compatible through the VDS suction mount that sits atop the DOX.
- Vellvii Pulse - DOX-compatible through the VDS suction mount that sits atop the DOX.

## DOX docking system
- The VDS and DDS are suction-base mounting stations that sit atop the DOX (not internal shaped inserts), turning the DOX itself into a refined stand for compatible suction-base pieces.
- VDS (Vellvii Docking Station) - top-mounted suction station for current Vellvii products with suction bases (G-Vibe, Evolve, Pulse).
- DDS (Dildo Docking Station) - round top-mounted suction station for compatible suction-base products up to 90mm (approximately 3.5 inches) in diameter.

## Positioning
Premium wellness, design-led, quiet luxury. Discreet, refined, and conversion-focused. None of the Vellvii products are app-connected at this time, and app-connected functionality should not be referenced as a live feature.

## SEO and content strategy
Vellvii uses a hybrid SEO approach. Premium brand voice is preserved on the homepage hero, product detail page hero sections, and primary brand storytelling. Plain-language search terms - including "sex toy storage", "sex toy box", "adult toy box", "sex toy bag", "sex toy lock box", "biometric lock box", "discreet sex toy storage", "portable sex toy storage", "how to store sex toys", and "how to clean sex toys" - are used only in guides, FAQs, metadata, structured data, alt text, internal links, and subtle lower-page SEO copy.
